<!--
  PR title = commit subject line.
  Format: <type>(<scope>): <short imperative summary>  (≤72 chars)
  Examples:
    feat(git-workflow): add squash merge strategy guidance
    fix(agents): correct section reference to §Commit Message Format
    docs(github): add branch protection best practices

  Body below = commit body (pre-filled as squash/merge commit message).
  Explain WHY, not what. Wrap at 72 chars.
-->

## Why

<!--
  What problem does this change solve?
  Why is this the right solution?
  What would break or be missing without it?
-->

## What changed

<!--
  Brief bullets if the why doesn't cover it.
  Delete this section if the why is self-contained.
-->

## References

<!--
  Links to related issues, docs, prior PRs, external sources.
  Delete if not applicable.
-->
